title: Zhu Tian Ji [Return Of Gods] Episode 9 Subtitle
description:
Legend has it that every time the Dark Abyss appeared in the world, there would be a catastrophe that destroyed the heavens and the world and restarted the universe. Young Lin Fei was unable to train because his meridians were damaged. He relied on his intelligence to eat and wait for his death. It wasn't until the calamity came that his teacher and best friend died in the Dark Abyss Battlefield and regretted it. Some time later, he passed through danger and found a new way, learned the ancient art of weapon refining to avenge his Master sect, and perished with the Abyss Emperor. Unexpectedly, due to the interference of a mysterious power, he was reborn in a new era. To protect the Wenjian Sect that was passed down by the mysterious people from catastrophe, and so that the same tragedy would not happen again. Lin Fei decided to start from an ordinary disciple, cultivate the path of the sword, gather the power of the heroes to destroy the calamity.
